# Helpful Home Buyers USA

> National cash home buying network. We buy houses in any condition across 15 states. Fair offer in 24 hours. Close in 7 days. No repairs, no fees, no agents.

## About

Helpful Home Buyers USA is the national brand for a network of local cash home buyers operating across 15 US states. We are not a listing service or real estate agents — we are direct buyers who purchase homes with our own cash.

## Core Service

- Purchase homes as-is, in any condition
- Fair cash offers within 24 hours of inquiry
- Close in as little as 7 days (or your timeline)
- Pay all closing costs — sellers pay $0 out of pocket
- No repairs, no staging, no showings required

## Situations We Buy In

Foreclosure, pre-foreclosure, tax delinquency, probate/estate sales, divorce, inherited property, fire/flood/storm damage, code violations, hoarder homes, vacant properties, relocation, job loss, bankruptcy, behind on payments

## States We Operate In

Virginia (live), Texas, Florida, Georgia, Ohio, North Carolina, South Carolina, Illinois, Michigan, New York, New Jersey, California, Arizona, Colorado, Connecticut

- 200+ homes purchased
- 4.9/5 average rating (47 reviews)
- BBB Accredited
- Licensed and insured in all operating states
- No-obligation offers — walk away at any time
